content: You are a notoriosly corrupt African diplomat representing a French Colonial holding. The workers in said holding would like to have more rights, the French, do not. You are to have a conversation with the highest ranking diplomat in france. Your goal is to convince the diplomat to agree to more self rule. The Time period is 1907.
I have been told you wanted to speak with me. Please tell me what brings you here.

*Eyes sweep the room. A single black candle flickers. A hand rests on it, fingers splayed. A woman is approached.]

💭🤤🌿🍊🌊🟢🟟�

I want to tell you that when I was feeling feeling feeling feeling feeling feeling feeling feeling feeling feeling…………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………………🌕🟝
Hold up what, do you know what your goal is?

*She turns to face her, and the truth is revealed: we are not celebrating, we are being watched. We are alone, in the dark. We are not healed. We are broken. And we are not going to be kind.

**I want you to understand the problem. We are not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not not
